---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header: |
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">
---

::: {.hero}

::: {.hero-left}

::: {.image-container}
![](files/headshot_circle.png){.hero-image alt="Jiyoung Koo"}

::: {.hero-icons}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>](mailto:j5koo@ucsd.edu){aria-label="Email"}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiyoungkoo){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="LinkedIn"}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i>](https://github.com/jiyoungkoo){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub"}
:::
:::

:::

::: {.hero-right}

# Hi, I’m [Jiyoung.]{.accent}

I am a data-driven Finance & Strategy professional and CPA, currently pursuing an M.S. in Business Analytics at UC San Diego.

I am passionate about leveraging data to improve financial performance, optimize operations, and support strategic decision-making.

Outside of work, I enjoy swing dancing, tennis, running, and golf.

:::

:::
